item.title: ZaiNar raises $100M and launches physical AI platform
item.description: ZaiNar debuted its platform for physical AI, which it said turns any wireless network into a sensing system. The post ZaiNar raises $100M and launches...

item.title: VDMA warns Germany is losing ground in global robotics race
item.description: Germanyâs robotics industry is heading for another year of decline, as rising global competition and structural challenges test its strength. The post...

item.title: The hidden infrastructure challenge facing outdoor robotics OEMs
item.description: Robotic mowers are ditching wires for GPS. OEMs must now build complex data infrastructure or partner with specialists to scale. The post The hidden i...

item.title: Tesollo commercializes its lightweight, compact robotic hand for humanoids
item.description: Tesollo said its DG-5F-S robotic hand supports precise grasping and manipulation motions required for humanoid robots. The post Tesollo commercializes...

item.title: Fictiv and MISUMI report on the state of manufacturing, supply chain digitalization
